rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND ALLEN et al VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Rca'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 18, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANT R.C.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO OBTAIN EVIDENCE TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO R.C.A. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BONNIE GEORGE VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 18, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT RILEY POWER, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY RESPONSES. SMITH DECLARATION IS UNNECESSARY FOR DEFENDANT TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF AND THE COURT STRIKES IT FOR LACK OF PROPER FOUNDATION. REQUEST TO CONTINUE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE WHY THE DISCOVERY HAS NOT BEEN COMPLETED AND TO ARTICULATE WHAT FACTS WILL BE DISCOVERED IF THE CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED. =(302/PJM/PB)
